purpose: Defines preflight-only readiness gate for first real-use pilot without executing pilot runtime yet.
required_questions: What is the source of truth for this claim?
What cap applies if evidence is missing?
What would make this claim fake-green?
pass_criteria: All criteria include owner value, evidence, and PASS/WARN/BLOCK logic.
Current status is explicit per criterion.
No real-use execution claim is made without required evidence.
warn_criteria: Some criteria are still UNKNOWN but improvement hooks exist.
Pilot is preflight-ready only with warnings/caps.
block_criteria: Matrix claims active production capability without evidence.
next_action: Use this matrix in next preflight/pilot closure loop and update criterion statuses with receipts.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Pilot definition is explicit and distinct from synthetic fixtures.
criteria.owner_value: Prevents confusion between fixture success and real-use proof.
criteria.pass_logic: Real-use pilot scope, exclusions, and review roles are documented.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Select one safe pilot candidate and freeze acceptance thresholds.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Resolver and entry safety gates are satisfied before pilot start.
criteria.owner_value: Pilot is not launched on unstable intake/resolver foundation.
criteria.pass_logic: All mandatory resolver hardening negatives are reproducibly blocked.
criteria.warn_logic: Most cases pass but residual caps remain.
criteria.block_logic: Mandatory resolver negatives are missing or non-blocking.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Add local checker that fails on regression in mandatory negatives.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Pilot remains preflight-only until Owner explicitly unlocks execution.
criteria.owner_value: Control over risk and timing of first real-use action.
criteria.pass_logic: Reports explicitly state no real-use runtime executed.
criteria.warn_logic: Some wording risks overclaim but capped.
criteria.block_logic: Any claim suggests pilot execution already happened.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Introduce explicit pilot unlock receipt template.
